_schema.description: Curated log of in-window external events the playbook matcher uses for its 'event:<key>' triggers. Read by brain/playbook.py at every Master Strategist run. The most recent in-window event for a given key wins; future-dated events are ignored until their date arrives. The file is allowed to be empty (`{"events": []}`) — affected cases simply stay silent.

fields.key: Stable identifier referenced by playbook cases via 'event:<key>'. Examples: 'imf_sba_or_eff_approval', 'election_window', 'sbp_decision_day', 'budget_announcement'.
fields.date: ISO date the event was announced or occurred (YYYY-MM-DD).
fields.decay_days: How many days after `date` the event continues to fire. Defaults to 14. Beyond this window the event no longer matches.
fields.description: One-sentence human summary the strategist surfaces when the case fires.

_schema.how_to_add_an_event: Append a new object to `events`. The matcher activates it immediately (no rebuild needed). Past-dated events outside their decay window are silently ignored; future-dated events are silently ignored until their date.
_schema.research_basis: Pakistan Stock Market Research Factors.docx — Macroeconomic Determinants / Political Risk sections.

events.description: IMF Executive Board approves $6bn 39-month Extended Fund Facility for Pakistan.
IMF approves $1.386bn emergency Rapid Financing Instrument disbursement for Pakistan (COVID-19).
IMF completes 2nd-5th combined EFF reviews; ~$500m disbursement.
IMF completes 7th-8th combined EFF reviews; ~$1.17bn tranche, ending 18-month gap.
Staff-level agreement on the new 9-month $3bn SBA, replacing the lapsed EFF. Bridge to the formal board approval two weeks later.
IMF Executive Board approves $3bn 9-month Stand-By Arrangement for Pakistan; immediate $1.2bn disbursement.
IMF completes 1st SBA review; ~$700m tranche disbursed.
IMF completes 2nd and final SBA review; ~$1.1bn final tranche disbursed.
IMF Executive Board approves new $7bn 37-month Extended Fund Facility for Pakistan; immediate $1bn disbursement.
Staff-level agreement on 1st EFF review (~$1bn tranche pending board approval).
IMF completes 1st EFF review; $1.023bn tranche disbursed plus $1.4bn Resilience and Sustainability Facility access.
IMF completes 2nd EFF review; ~$1.1bn tranche disbursed.
